entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `exercises` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `muscle_groups` TEXT NOT NULL, `secondary_muscle_groups` TEXT NOT NULL, `equipment` TEXT NOT NULL, `difficulty` TEXT NOT NULL, `instructions` TEXT NOT NULL, `youtube_video_id` TEXT, `is_custom` INTEGER NOT NULL, `is_deleted` INTEGER NOT NULL, `created_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `workout_plans` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `split_type` TEXT NOT NULL, `days_per_week` INTEGER NOT NULL, `muscle_groups` TEXT NOT NULL, `created_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, `is_template` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `workout_plan_exercises` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `plan_id` TEXT NOT NULL, `exercise_id` TEXT NOT NULL, `day_index` INTEGER NOT NULL, `order_index` INTEGER NOT NULL, `sets` INTEGER NOT NULL, `reps` INTEGER NOT NULL, `notes` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`), FOREIGN KEY(`plan_id`) REFERENCES `workout_plans`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE, FOREIGN KEY(`exercise_id`) REFERENCES `exercises`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE RESTRICT)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `workout_sessions` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `plan_id` TEXT, `started_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, `completed_at` INTEGER, `notes` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`), FOREIGN KEY(`plan_id`) REFERENCES `workout_plans`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE SET NULL)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `session_sets` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `session_id` TEXT NOT NULL, `plan_exercise_id` TEXT, `set_number` INTEGER NOT NULL, `reps_completed` INTEGER NOT NULL, `weight_kg` REAL, `completed_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`), FOREIGN KEY(`session_id`) REFERENCES `workout_sessions`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE, FOREIGN KEY(`plan_exercise_id`) REFERENCES `workout_plan_exercises`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE SET NULL)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `user_preferences` (`id` INTEGER NOT NULL, `rest_timer_seconds` INTEGER NOT NULL, `available_equipment` TEXT NOT NULL, `min_difficulty` TEXT NOT NULL, `max_difficulty` TEXT NOT NULL, `exercises_per_muscle_group` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

setupQueries: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS room_master_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,identity_hash TEXT)
INSERT OR REPLACE INTO room_master_table (id,identity_hash) VALUES(42, 'placeholder_will_be_generated_on_first_build')
